name: GreenGrid Energy (LLM Adaptive)
page_context: Utility company customer dashboard showing account details, current billing, energy usage history, and payment history.

current_bill.description: The current monthly bill amount displayed prominently on the dashboard.

usage_kwh.description: Current month energy usage in kilowatt-hours (kWh).

account_number.description: The customer's account number, usually a numeric identifier.

service_address.description: The physical address where energy service is provided.

plan_name.description: The customer's current energy plan or rate plan name.

meter_id.description: The utility meter identifier for the service address.

next_read_date.description: The next scheduled meter reading date.

customer_name.description: The full name of the account holder.

customer_email.description: The email address associated with the account.

customer_phone.description: The phone number on file for the account.

usage_history.description: Monthly energy usage history table with columns for month, kWh consumed, cost, and average temperature.

kwh.description: Energy consumed in kWh for this month.

cost.description: Total cost for this month's energy usage.

avg_temp.description: Average temperature during this billing period.

payments.description: Recent payment history showing date, description, amount, and status.
